title: cyrilla racemiflora var. brevifolia
intro: Cyrilla racemiflora var. brevifolia, also known as the 'Short-Flowered Cyrilla', is a variety of the Cyrilla racemiflora plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Cyrillaceae. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyrilla racemiflora var. brevifolia include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and treat various respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Cyrilla racemiflora var. brevifolia is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
